text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wake up early one morning during summer camp
and head outside to find...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin... Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sakura Bakushin O is in the middle of a jog.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh! Trainer! Good morning!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yes! I'm remarkable, after all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Waking up early is an important part of being a
class representative and a role model to all
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Evening means getting proper sleep while the
lights are out, and morning means rising with the
sun! I wake up earlier than anyone else to do
some solo training!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Showing that side of myself will help me gain the
respect of others as well!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even during the summer camp, she works hard to
set a good example for those looking up to her as
a role model. What an admirable attitude.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So, don't forget to take tons of photos of me,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I want to put up a sign in the dorm area that
reads "exemplary model student."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like that kind of action may be missing the
mark a little. Or perhaps a lot.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Sooo! Trainer, I want to undergo some real
old-school super tough training!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as we're at a training camp, I want to make
it an exemplary camp experience!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So I want the toughest you've got! That's the
genius plan I thought up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: So, give me the most rigorous training you've got!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll endure more intensity than anyone else, come
what may! Mud, sweat, tears! Give it to me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
When it's all said and done, I'll emerge an even
greater class representative!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of her motivation, her enthusiasm is a
good thing. She'll probably be delighted if I pick
something very hard.
choice_data_list: Swim in the ocean till you reach your limit!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Logs?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...Nice! Good idea, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly the kind of toughness I was
thinking of!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Time to Bakushin to the forest!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Mmm...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There are no logs! All of the trees are still alive! I
can't lift like this!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Maybe, if I...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If... if I chop down a few trees, we'll have all the
logs we need! Right? Right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I leave her be, she's likely to do something
reckless. I need to tempt her with something
else...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! I just had a great idea!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You can be the tree!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm gonna carry you around!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Heave-ho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a while after that, I grapple with Sakura
Bakushin O like my life depends on it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: A test of my limits! How very spartan!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I got it! Let me try! Bakushin... guuuts!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to push my limits! I'm going to keep
swimming till I go beyond the horizon!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay! I've stopped!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing her, she'll actually swim off somewhere
far away and exhaust herself in the open waters.
It could end up being quite dangerous...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Sure!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Erm, it's too shallow to swim...
choice_data_list:
A class representative like you should be able
to swim even in shallow water!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You're right! There's nothing I can't do!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'm going to test my limits in the shallows!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Well, it seems shallow around here...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Grrr! You! You dare cross my path!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you! Crab! You've got some nerve to
challenge me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I accept your challenge!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, I watch over Sakura Bakushin O for a
while as she frolics by the water's edge...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I pushed myself to my limit! All the while
sustaining that crab's assault!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It was quite the tough training session, but I
somehow managed to prevail!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her objective changed halfway through, but the
ordeal seems to have somehow helped her grow.
